name: Chip

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot <span>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-chip density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the padding shifts — text size + radius stay governed by Size.

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the chip is pressed (only applies when Clickable is true). Default is None.

examples.title: Variants
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    <Chip>Default</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Outline">Outline</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="primary">Primary</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="destructive">Destructive</Chip>
    <Chip Variant="Chip.ChipVariant.Solid" Color="success">Success</Chip>
</ChipGroup>

examples.title: Closable
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    @foreach (var tag in _tags)
    {
        var t = tag;
        <Chip Closable="true" OnClose="@(() => _tags.Remove(t))">@t</Chip>
    }
</ChipGroup>

examples.title: Clickable
examples.code:
<ChipGroup>
    @foreach (var filter in _filters)
    {
        var f = filter;
        <Chip Clickable="true"
              Variant="@(_active == f ? Chip.ChipVariant.Solid : Chip.ChipVariant.Outline)"
              Color="@(_active == f ? "primary" : null)"
              OnClick="@(() => _active = f)">
            @f
        </Chip>
    }
</ChipGroup>

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot <span>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set.

mdSummary:
# Chip

Compact removable tag, optionally toggleable.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Status & Indicators
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/chip

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Chip | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Chip | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot <span>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set. |
| Chip | Variant | `ChipVariant` | `ChipVariant.Default` |  |
| Chip | Color | `string?` | `` |  |
| Chip | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| Chip | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-chip density override. When null, inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, matches the historical Comfortable default. Only the padding shifts — text size + radius stay governed by Size. |
| Chip | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Chip | Closable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Chip | OnClose | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Chip | Clickable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Chip | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| Chip | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| Chip | Icon | `string?` | `` |  |
| Chip | Avatar | `string?` | `` |  |
| Chip | PressEffect | `Button.ButtonPressEffect` | `Button.ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the chip is pressed (only applies when Clickable is true). Default is None. |
| Chip | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Chip | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ChipGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ChipGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ChipGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Chip) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (Chip) — Optional leading icon slot. Rendered before ChildContent inside an inline-flex items-center shrink-0 wrapper so sized content (e.g. a colour-dot <span>) retains its explicit dimensions. Only active when neither Avatar nor Icon is set.
- `ChildContent` (ChipGroup) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnClose` (`EventCallback`)
- `OnClick` (`EventCallback`)

## Sub-components
- `ChipGroup`

## Cascading values it expects
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleKeyDown handles Enter in Chip.razor
- `Space` — HandleKeyDown handles Space in Chip.razor

## Example
```razor
<Chip />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Chip/Chip.razor`
- `UI/Chip/ChipGroup.razor`
